title: Ethiopian-Style Red Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Ethiopian-inspired stew made with red lentils, onions, garlic, and spices.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the misir wot spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lentils, water, and salt. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the lentils are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
